creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to kaltheat from comment #0)

The exact same scanner type V600/GT-X820 works fine for me. My version of epsonscan2 was built on a current 14.0-CURRENT with llvm15.

I think J.R. Oldroyd is right. It is likely that something is wrong with your configuration. Please follow his advice and provide feedback regarding the configuration in your .SF2 file.
